title: Relative clauses with that
subtitle: Add information about things.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: This is the app that I use every day.
这是我每天使用的应用。
I bought a bag that is light and strong.
我买了一个又轻又结实的包。
I use the app that has speaking practice.
我用那个有口语练习的应用。

items.en: This is the app that I use every day.
items.zh: 这是我每天使用的应用。

items.en: I bought a bag that is light and strong.
items.zh: 我买了一个又轻又结实的包。

items.en: I use the app that has speaking practice.
items.zh: 我用那个有口语练习的应用。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I use the app that has speaking practice.
lines.zh: 我用那个有口语练习的应用。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I bought a bag that is light and strong.
lines.zh: 我买了一个又轻又结实的包。

items.en: This is the app that I use every day.
items.zh: 这是我每天使用的应用。

items.en: I bought a bag that is light and strong.
items.zh: 我买了一个又轻又结实的包。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
